creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
Oh yes.  This must be the smartest way, as well as very clear!
I like it.  Would you mind to commit the patch you solved?
(As you know it needs upgrading audio/wildmidi beforehand.)
Thank you.


2012/2/8, crees@freebsd.org <crees@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: upgrade multimedia/qmmp to 0.5.3

> State-Changed-Why:

> ffmpeg dependencies more gracefully.  Thoughts?
